'''Scimitar Squadron''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] fighter group consisting of [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wings]]. During the time of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invasion the unit was led by [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ijix Harona]]. After the [[Second Battle of Obroa-skai|victory at Obroa-skai]], the Scimitars were stationed at the Republic's forward base on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. While engaged in training exercises with [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo's]] [[Twin Suns Squadron]], Harona and Solo received a distress call from the ''[[Far Thunder]]'', a cruiser that had been left behind at [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]]. The two squadrons hypered to the so-called Library World to fend off Yuuzhan Vong forces long enough to allow ''Far Thunder's'' crew to be evacuated.

Later, Scimitar Squadron would participate in [[Second Battle of Bilbringi|Operation Trinity]] at [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi]] and the rescue of [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] prisoners at [[Selvaris]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
